summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of VenuLoQ RM Onboarding workflow. All 19 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows tested successfully - Admin creates RM, RM onboarding (password change, profile completion, awaiting verification), HR dashboard with verification actions, and verified RM dashboard access.

issues: Console warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' hydration error - minor React structure issue but doesn't affect functionality

frontend.test: Admin login → /admin/dashboard redirect
Navigate to /admin/users → Users table loads
Create RM button visible with UserPlus icon
Click Create RM → Modal opens with name, email, password fields
Modal shows 'What happens next?' workflow explanation

backend.test: New RM login returns must_change_password=true, profile_completed=false, verification_status=pending
RM can login with temp password

frontend.test: New RM login → Shows password change screen (Step 1 of 3)
Progress indicator shows 3 steps

backend.test: POST /api/auth/change-password accepts current and new password
RM can login with new password

frontend.test: Password change form has current, new, confirm password fields
Show/Hide passwords toggle works
Submit → Success toast → Advances to Step 2

backend.test: PUT /api/auth/rm-profile accepts phone, address, emergency contact fields

frontend.test: Profile form shows Name (read-only), Phone, Address, Emergency Contact fields
Photo upload button present with camera icon
Submit → Success toast → Advances to Step 3 (Awaiting HR)

backend.test: After profile complete, RM login blocked with 403

frontend.test: Step 3 shows 'Awaiting HR Verification' with clock icon
Shows 'What happens next?' checklist
Sign Out button available

backend.test: GET /api/hr/pending returns RMs with profile_completed=true and verification_status=pending
GET /api/hr/staff returns all RMs with status

frontend.test: HR login (hr@venuloq.in / hr123) → /hr/dashboard redirect
Dashboard shows 4 stat cards: Pending, Verified, Rejected, Incomplete
Click stat card filters RM list
RM cards show avatar, name, email, INCOMPLETE badge if applicable
Click RM card expands to show profile details (phone, address, emergency contact)

backend.test: Rejected RM login returns 403 with 'rejected' message

frontend.test: Expanded pending RM card shows Approve and Reject buttons
Verified RM cards show verification timestamp and verified_by name

backend.test: After HR approval, RM login returns verification_status=verified

frontend.test: Approved RM login → /rm/dashboard (not onboarding)
Dashboard shows 'Welcome back!' toast
Sidebar has Dashboard and My Performance links
Search and filter components visible

seed_data_creation: Created 2 test RMs during testing (one approved, one rejected) with TEST_ prefix pattern in emails

steps: 1. Admin creates RM with temp password via POST /api/admin/create-rm
2. RM logs in → must_change_password=true triggers RMOnboarding component Step 1
3. RM changes password via POST /api/auth/change-password → advances to Step 2
4. RM fills profile via PUT /api/auth/rm-profile → profile_completed=true → Step 3
5. RM login blocked with 403 'pending HR verification' until HR acts
6. HR views pending RMs via GET /api/hr/pending, approves via PATCH /api/hr/verify/{id}
7. After approval, RM login succeeds and redirects to /rm/dashboard
rm_onboarding_workflow.frontend_intercept: App.js ProtectedRoute intercepts RMs with must_change_password=true OR profile_completed=false OR verification_status=pending and shows RMOnboarding component

context_for_next_testing_agent: RM Onboarding workflow fully tested and working. Flow: Admin creates RM → RM logs in, changes password, completes profile → blocked with 403 until HR approves → HR approves/rejects via /hr/dashboard → approved RM can access /rm/dashboard. Test RMs created with unique timestamp emails. The RMOnboarding.js component handles 3-step flow (password→profile→waiting). HR has hr@venuloq.in/hr123 credentials and can view/approve/reject RMs from /hr/dashboard.
